title: Checkout

address.pickupNote: No delivery address needed for pickup orders.

form.label: Label
form.instructionsPlaceholder: e.g. Ring doorbell, leave at door

validation.labelMax: Label must be at most 50 characters.

validation.postalCodeFormat: Postal code must be exactly 4 digits.

methods.cardDesc: Pay securely with Visa, Mastercard, or AMEX
methods.postfinanceDesc: Pay with PostFinance Card or E-Finance

tip.title: Tip for Courier

instructions.title: Special Instructions

instructions.placeholder: e.g. Ring doorbell, no onions, extra napkins

specialInstructions.title: Special Instructions
specialInstructions.placeholder: Any special requests for your order?

summary.title: Order Summary
summary.belowMinimum: Your order is {{amount}} below the minimum.

termsNotice: By placing your order, you agree to our terms and conditions.

errors.belowMinimum: Your order doesn't meet the minimum order amount.
errors.minimumOrder: Your order doesn't meet the minimum order of {{amount}}.
errors.orderFailed: Failed to place your order. Please try again.
errors.paymentFailed: Payment initiation failed. Please try again.
errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.

stripe.title: Enter Card Details
stripe.genericError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
stripe.completeAbove: Complete your card payment in the form above.

confirmation.title: Order Confirmed!
confirmation.subtitle: Your order has been placed successfully.
confirmation.pendingSubtitle: Your payment is being processed. Please wait...
confirmation.failedSubtitle: Your payment could not be processed. Please try again.
confirmation.paymentPendingDesc: Please complete the payment to confirm your order.
confirmation.cashNote: Please have the exact amount ready for the courier.
confirmation.step1: The restaurant will confirm your order shortly.
confirmation.step2: A courier will pick up your order and deliver it to you.
confirmation.step3: You can track your delivery in real-time.

sandbox.notice: SANDBOX MODE — This is a simulated payment page for development testing.
sandbox.processingDesc: Please wait while we confirm your payment.
sandbox.redirecting: Redirecting you back to the shop...
sandbox.confirmError: Could not confirm the payment. Please try again.
sandbox.sessionExpiredDesc: Your payment session has timed out. Please start a new payment.
